PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME" | grep -qE '^(run_in_terminal|create_and_run_task)$'; then changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$changed" | grep -qE 'backend/src/.*\.ts$'; then cd /Users/charles/Documents/abclumni/backend && npx prisma generate --silent && npx tsc --noEmit || exit 2; fi; if echo "$changed" | grep -qE 'frontend/src/.*\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then cd /Users/charles/Documents/abclumni/frontend && node_modules/.bin/eslint --max-warnings=0 src || exit 2; fi; fi
